productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex SD Wave Flop Green Slippers
description: Let your little one flip flop in pure comfort and joy in this pair of Scooby Doo Wave Flops from Warner Brothers. With a cushioned footbed and a grippy outsole, it makes for a safe pair of casual footwear. Upper Soft fabric twill straps with a toe separator Cushioned PU footbed with print Outsole Textured, Flexible and durable rubber outsole with modified herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction Care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
